treatment_information.treatment_response: No effective relief reported; patient felt tired after hydromorphone

treatment_timeline.event: Gabapentin was prescribed and then weaned off due to ineffectiveness
Hydromorphone prescribed but patient reported it made her feel tired
MRI of the brain was performed

patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient described themselves as clear and coherent, alert and interactive
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient's symptoms included numbness and instability, with unclear cause for MRI signal changes
